creator: emz@norma.perm.ru
text:
After upgrade to 12.0-RELEASE I got repeatable, reproducible panics when deleting gre interfaces. Paniv happens with about 66% probability: I got 2 immediate panics from 3 deletes.

System: FreeBSD moscow-alpha 12.0-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE-p3 r344740 MOSCOW  amd64

Backtrace:

===Cut===
